generated_oml:

prefix base: http://example.org/base/ 

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of friction loss relationships to enhance robot motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data and performance metrics visualization for user interaction and informed decision-making"
]

]
